x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement which specifies to charge fees when banking transactions did take place, accompanied by the modalities to calculate and charge the fees and the related terms and conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement into which both parties confirm on an interest feature.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lien Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement that grants a creditor the right to use an asset as a guarantee for an underlying obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sweep Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Arrangement in which funds are transferred from one deposit account to another when a certain threshold is reached.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement which specifies the acceptance of deposits, accompanied by the modalities to deposit money.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Withdrawal Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement which specifies the acceptance of withdrawals, accompanied by the modalities to withdraw money.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement which specifies the promise to offer the payment service, accompanied by the payment modalities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Asset Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement within an agreement where an Asset is provided as security for a payment or repayment of an obligation. (BIAN)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Device Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Arrangement on the provision and use of product instruments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Corporate Action Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: A decision of a corporation's board of directors that brings or could bring an actual change to the existing corporate capital structure or financial condition. (Adapted from ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Leasing Asset Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement is specifying the asset that is financed in the leasing agreement.
